mapper.select: /* SQL ID : CrsDAO.selectCrs 설 명 : 과정 목록 */ SELECT A.CRS_ID , A.CRS_CTGRCD , A.THM_ID , A.ORG_ID , A.SBJCT_TYCD , A.SBJCT_OP_TYCD , A.CRSNM , A.CRS_EXPLN , A.ENRL_CERT_MTHD , A.QUOTA_LMTYN , A.EDU_QUOTA , A.FNSH_SCR , A.FNSH_PROC_TYCD , A.DPLM_ISSUYN , A.USEYN , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_CRS A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.CRS_ID = #{crsCd}

/* SQL ID : CrsDAO.selectCrsView 설 명 : 과정 view */ SELECT CRS_ID , CRS_CTGRCD , THM_ID , CRSNM , CRS_EXPLN , SBJCT_OP_TYCD , ENRL_CERT_MTHD , FNSH_PROC_TYCD , FNSH_SCR , DPLM_ISSUYN , SBJCT_TYCD , EDU_QUOTA , QUOTA_LMTYN , USEYN , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A WHERE A.CRS_ID = CRS_ID AND SBJCT_ID = NVL(#{crsYear}, A.SBJCT_ID)) AS CRE_CRS_CNT , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_CRS WHERE CRS_ID = #{crsCd}
AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}

/* SQL ID : CrsDAO.selectCrsByCrsCreCd 설 명 : */ SELECT DISTINCT B.CRS_ID , B.CRSNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_CRS B ON A.CRS_ID = B.CRS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE (A.SBJCT_ID, A.CRS_ID) = (SELECT SBJCT_ID, CRS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) AND A.DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : CrsDAO.selectCrsByUserId 설 명 : */ SELECT DISTINCT B.CRS_ID , B.CRSNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_CRS B ON A.CRS_ID = B.CRS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID IN (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y') AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND A.CRS_ID = #{creTerm}

/* SQL ID : CrsDAO.selectCrsInfo 설 명 : */ SELECT A.CRS_ID , A.CRS_CTGRCD , A.THM_ID , A.ORG_ID , A.SBJCT_TYCD , A.SBJCT_OP_TYCD , A.CRSNM , A.CRS_EXPLN , A.ENRL_CERT_MTHD , A.QUOTA_LMTYN , A.EDU_QUOTA , A.FNSH_SCR , A.FNSH_PROC_TYCD , A.DPLM_ISSUYN , A.USEYN , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_CRS A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.CRS_ID = #{crsCd}

/* SQL ID : CrsDAO.selectCrsNmCheck 설 명 : 과목명 중복 체크 */
SELECT COUNT(CRSNM) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_CRS WHERE LOWER(CRSNM) LIKE CONCAT('%',LOWER(#{crsNm}),'%')
mapper.delete:
/* SQL ID : CrsDAO.delete 설 명 : 과정 삭제 */
UPDATE TB_LMS_CRS SET DELYN = 'Y' WHERE CRS_ID = #{crsCd}
